zh.title: 雪崩币/美元技术分析：窄幅震荡偏多延续
zh.content:
当前AVAX/USD处于窄幅震荡偏多结构，价格运行于6.72-6.76区间上沿，短线多头略占优势，但动能有限，整体仍属盘整上行阶段

SMA20位于6.688附近且价格持续站上均线，短期均线支撑有效。MACD红柱微弱扩张显示多头动能改善但尚未放量，需观察持续性

下方支撑关注6.70与6.68一带，若跌破或回测均线将转弱；上方阻力在6.76及前高6.80区域，突破需放量确认趋势延续

交易上建议以回调低吸为主，6.70上方可分批布局多单，止损设6.68下方；若放量突破6.76，可顺势追多但控制仓位谨慎执行

en.title: Avalanche vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
AVAX/USD is currently trading in a tight consolidation around 6.75 after a modest 24-hour gain of 0.53%. Price action remains compressed between 6.7169 and 6.7662, indicating low volatility and short-term equilibrium. The broader intraday structure leans slightly bullish as price holds above the 20-period SMA at 6.68825. This suggests buyers are maintaining control, though momentum lacks strong expansion and requires a breakout for continuation.

Momentum indicators show a mild bullish bias. The MACD reading at 0.0357 is above zero, signaling positive momentum, although the absence of a signal line limits crossover confirmation. With RSI(14) unavailable, overbought or oversold conditions cannot be assessed. Price holding above the SMA(20) at 6.68825 reinforces a short-term supportive trend, but the weak spread suggests momentum is still developing rather than accelerating decisively.

Immediate support is established near 6.72, aligning with the intraday low at 6.7169, followed by stronger structural support around the 20-SMA at 6.68825. A breakdown below this zone could expose a deeper retracement toward 6.60. On the upside, resistance is located at 6.7662, the recent high, with a breakout potentially opening the path toward 6.80 and beyond if volume confirms expansion.

Traders may consider a breakout strategy, watching for a sustained move above 6.7662 with volume confirmation before initiating long positions. Alternatively, dip-buying near 6.72–6.69 support offers a lower-risk entry aligned with the SMA structure. Risk management is essential, with stops placed below 6.65 to protect against breakdown scenarios. Upside targets include 6.80 initially, with extension potential if momentum and MACD continue improving.
